source_pr.title: store/tikv: move 2pc tests to standalone directory
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?
store/tikv has dependencies on `mockstore` and `unistore` because tests need to use them. We can resolve it by moving all tests to standaline package.

Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:
- move test files into `store/tikv/tests`
- add *Probe utils to expose internal states of `store/tikv`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

symptoms: The test is too slow under `go test -race` (race detector overhead) and can time out / become flaky
failure_signature: test takes too long under the race detector (timeout/slow execution under -race)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to timing/timeout sensitivity under the race detector: `-race` significantly slows execution, and this particular 2PC test is heavy enough to become unstable or exceed time limits when run with race instrumentation. This PR stabilizes it by moving the slow 2PC tests into a separate file/package and marking the slow test with a `!race` build tag so it is skipped under `go test -race`.
fix_pattern: Isolate slow tests and exclude them from `-race` runs (e.g., `// +build !race`) to avoid race-detector-induced timeouts.

evidence: evidence: +// The test takes too long under the race detector.
files: store/tikv/lock_test.go, store/tikv/test_probe.go, store/tikv/tests/2pc_fail_test.go, store/tikv/tests/2pc_slow_test.go, store/tikv/tests/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/ticlient_slow_test.go
